---
title: "Home"
---

::: {.hero}
# Sophia Sufei Chen

Business Studies Student | Business Analytics, Marketing Strategy & Process Improvement

I am a final-year Business Studies student at Dublin City University with academic interests in business analytics, marketing planning, and process improvement. Through university projects and internship experience, I have developed practical skills in business analysis, financial thinking, problem-solving, and professional communication.

[About Me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
[CV](cv.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
:::

## Welcome

This ePortfolio presents my academic background, project experience, and professional interests. It highlights my work in business analysis, marketing strategy, operational improvement, and customer-focused business development.
